title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Zedra Tax & Legal Limited
body: "Application number 5177  Applicant Zedra Legal Services (UK) Limited objected to the name used by Zedra Tax & Legal Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 19 May 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Zedra Tax & Legal Limited is changed to 15230597, Ltd. "
